fragments.1.1: The surface story is simple: an AI system surfaced fake shopping links.
fragments.1.1.1: The surface story is simple: an AI system surfaced fake shopping links.
fragments.1.2: The deeper chain is not simple: brand identity, acquisition, retired domains, official retail presence, scam copies, search indexing, and AI retrieval all collide.

fragments.1.1: In 1945, Vannevar Bush worried that humanity was producing more knowledge than it could meaningfully navigate.

fragments.1.3: The web solved publication. It did not solve memory.
